design_philosophy: A premium Ayurvedic D2C wellness brand inspired by Kashi. The aesthetic blends the grounded, organic nature of Ayurveda with a cinematic, moody, and expensive feel. Emphasize white/ivory negative space, delicate gold hairlines, and refined typography. Avoid generic e-commerce layouts, heavy gradients, or cheap dropshipping aesthetics.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-primary

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.description: Showcase VEDA + CHARAK COMBO. Headline: 'Ancient Ayurvedic Wisdom. Modern Daily Wellness.'
sections.instructions: Use a split-screen or an asymmetrical bento grid. The combo product image must be large and high-quality. Apply subtle zoom-in animation on the image. Background should be Warm Ivory.

sections.name: Trust Bar
sections.description: Logos and icons highlighting: Premium Quality, Inspired by Ayurveda, Secure Checkout, Customer Satisfaction
sections.instructions: A thin, elegant strip just below the hero. Use gold/accent hairlines to separate items. Font should be small, all-caps, widely tracked (overline style).

sections.name: Why Kashi Wellness
sections.description: Brand story emphasizing the connection to ancient Kashi.
sections.instructions: Editorial layout. Use the Varanasi ghats image alongside refined serif typography. Lots of negative space. Animate text fade-up on scroll.

sections.name: Featured Products
sections.description: Cards for VEDA (₹599), CHARAK (₹599), and COMBO (₹999).
sections.instructions: Cards should not look like standard Shopify blocks. Use borders, no heavy shadows. Background of cards in Soft Cream. Hover effect shows 'Quick Add' button.

sections.name: Benefits Showcase
sections.description: Iconography highlighting the fast-acting and deep relief benefits.
sections.instructions: Use minimalist SVG line icons (Phosphor or Lucide). Layout should be a 3 or 4-column grid with subtle dividers.

sections.name: Interactive Ingredient Story
sections.instructions: Clickable or hoverable tabs/cards that reveal the benefit, Ayurvedic significance, and modern explanation. Use the ingredient photos provided. Background should be Earthy Sandstone or Deep Forest Green for contrast.

sections.name: Transformation Journey
sections.description: Visual timeline: Problem -> Daily struggle -> Ayurvedic support -> Consistency -> Improved lifestyle.
sections.instructions: A vertical or horizontal timeline using elegant gold connecting lines. Minimal text, high-impact visuals.

sections.name: Why Customers Trust Us
sections.instructions: Use the Mortar & Pestle image. Darker background (Deep Forest Green) with Warm Ivory text for a premium feel.

sections.name: Product Comparison
sections.description: Table comparing VEDA, CHARAK, and COMBO.
sections.instructions: Minimalist table, no heavy grid lines. Use checkmarks (gold) and crossmarks. Focus on the COMBO being the best value.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.instructions: Masonry or slider layout. Give it a very editorial look, like quotes in a luxury magazine. Use large stylized quotation marks.

sections.name: Ayurveda Meets Modern Science
sections.instructions: Overlap text and imagery. Parallax scrolling effect on images.

sections.name: Founder Story
sections.instructions: Use the founder image. Layout like a magazine letter-from-the-editor. Include a stylized signature.

sections.name: Combo Offer Hero
sections.description: Highest conversion section for the VEDA + CHARAK COMBO.
sections.instructions: Full width, high contrast, clear CTA. Showcase the COMBO image prominently.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.instructions: Use Shadcn accordion. Thin borders. Open/close animation.

sections.name: Journal/Blog
sections.description: 4 sample cards for categories: Ayurveda, Wellness, Lifestyle, Ingredients.
sections.instructions: Grid layout. Images should zoom on hover. Titles in Serif font.

sections.name: Luxury Footer
sections.instructions: Generous padding. Large elegant typography for the newsletter signup. Links in small, tracked-out sans-serif.

components.cart_drawer: Slide-in cart drawer using Shadcn Sheet. Visual demo only. Must have a premium feel, list added items, and a checkout button.
components.buttons: Square or slight rounding (rounded-sm). Dark Green background with Ivory text, or Gold outline. Hover: slight lift and color shift. Use group-hover for internal icon movements.
components.inputs: Underline only or very subtle border (border-border). No heavy boxes.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='add-to-cart-combo', data-testid='shop-collection-hero-cta'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the application is mobile-first. Do not use Inter or generic fonts; implement Cormorant Garamond for headings and Manrope for body. Follow the HSL color tokens rigorously by setting them in tailwind.config.js or globals.css. Avoid typical e-commerce card looks—prioritize flat layouts with elegant thin borders, plenty of negative space, and typographic hierarchy. The cart is purely visual (frontend-only). Do not add a real backend. Build the 16 sections meticulously as defined.
